sections.paragraph:
εὑρίσκω - heuriskō - hyoo-ris'-ko

A prolonged form of a primary word εὕρω heurō; which (together with another cognate form, εὑρέω heureō) is used for it in all the tenses except the present and imperfect; to find (literally or figuratively): - find, get, obtain, perceive, see.
